# Story 6.1: BE — Schema Areas/Tables + Stores.tableMode + Orders.tableId/tableNameSnapshot

Status: done

<!-- Generated by bmad-create-story workflow on 2026-05-25. Ultimate context engine analysis completed - comprehensive developer guide created. -->

## Story

As a developer,
I want schema database mở rộng để hỗ trợ table-service mode,
so that các story BE và FE sau có thể CRUD `areas`/`tables`, lưu order kèm bàn, và toggle mode theo store.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Given schema Prisma cập nhật, when chạy `npx prisma migrate dev --name epic6-table-management`, then migration mới tạo:
   - Bảng `areas`: `id`, `tenant_id`, `store_id`, `name`, `sort_order`, `is_active`, `created_at`, `updated_at`; unique `(tenant_id, store_id, name)`.
   - Bảng `tables`: `id`, `tenant_id`, `store_id`, `area_id` FK, `name`, `capacity` int ≥1 default 2, `sort_order`, `is_active`, timestamps; unique `(tenant_id, store_id, name)`; index `(area_id)`.
   - Cột `stores.table_mode` boolean default `false`.
   - Cột `orders.table_id` UUID nullable FK → `tables.id`; index `(table_id)`.
   - Cột `orders.table_name_snapshot` text nullable; immutable sau insert (enforce ở service layer ở Story 6.4; schema story này chỉ thêm cột).
2. Given Prisma Client đã sinh, when import vào code, then có `Area`, `Table` models PascalCase singular; field camelCase: `tableId`, `tableNameSnapshot`, `tableMode`, `areaId`, `sortOrder`.
3. Given seed `prisma/seed.ts` mở rộng (brownfield patch Story 1.4), when chạy `npx prisma db seed`, then seed idempotent qua `upsert`:
   - Store hiện hữu giữ `tableMode=false` (counter-service).
   - Tạo store thứ 2 với `tableMode=true`, 2 areas (`Quầy chính`, `Sân ngoài`), 8 tables (4 mỗi area, capacity 2-4).
   - Tạo 2-3 sample synced orders với `tableId` non-null và `tableNameSnapshot` trong store thứ 2 để demo.
4. Given test e2e `seed.e2e-spec.ts`, when chạy `npm run test:e2e -- seed`, then verify đếm areas/tables, verify store counter không có bàn, store table-mode có 2 areas/8 tables, và verify cross-store/tenant isolation (store 1 không thấy tables của store 2 qua scoped Prisma context/query pattern).
5. Given tenant-scope extension hiện có, when thêm models mới, then `Area` và `Table` được thêm vào `SCOPED_MODELS`; mọi query business cho areas/tables phải yêu cầu `tenantId + storeId`, không cho phép truy vấn unscoped qua PrismaService trong code app.
6. Given schema mới nullable-backward-compatible, when chạy migration trên data hiện có, then đơn cũ vẫn hợp lệ (`orders.table_id = null`, `orders.table_name_snapshot = null`), idempotency unique hiện tại của orders/sync_log không đổi, và các endpoint/test orders hiện có không regression.

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [x] Cập nhật Prisma schema cho table management foundation (AC: 1, 2, 6)
  - [x] Trong `pos-api/prisma/schema.prisma`, thêm `tableMode Boolean @default(false) @map("table_mode")` vào `Store`.
  - [x] Thêm relation `areas Area[]` và `tables Table[]` vào `Tenant`/`Store`; thêm `tableOrders Order[]` hoặc relation name tương đương vào `Table` nếu Prisma cần disambiguation.
  - [x] Thêm model `Area` với naming/map đúng: model PascalCase singular, table `@@map("areas")`, fields camelCase + `@map` snake_case, unique `@@unique([tenantId, storeId, name], map: "uq_areas_tenant_store_name")`, index tenant/store nếu pattern yêu cầu.
  - [x] Thêm model `Table` với `areaId`, FK tới `Area`, `capacity Int @default(2)`, `sortOrder Int @default(0)`, `isActive Boolean @default(true)`, `@@unique([tenantId, storeId, name], map: "uq_tables_tenant_store_name")`, `@@index([areaId], map: "idx_tables_area_id")`, `@@map("tables")`.
  - [x] Mở rộng model `Order`: `tableId String? @map("table_id") @db.Uuid`, `tableNameSnapshot String? @map("table_name_snapshot")`, relation nullable tới `Table`, `@@index([tableId], map: "idx_orders_table_id")`.
  - [x] Không đổi existing `@@unique([tenantId, storeId, deviceId, clientOrderId])` của `Order` và `SyncLog`; `tableId` KHÔNG là một phần idempotency key.

- [x] Tạo migration Prisma và verify SQL an toàn brownfield (AC: 1, 6)
  - [x] Chạy từ `pos-api/`: `npx prisma migrate dev --name epic6-table-management`.
  - [x] Kiểm tra migration SQL: thêm cột nullable/default không phá data cũ; FK dùng `ON DELETE RESTRICT`/`ON UPDATE CASCADE` theo pattern hiện có; index/unique names đúng convention.
  - [x] Chạy `npx prisma generate` nếu script migrate chưa generate client.

- [x] Cập nhật tenant scope extension (AC: 5)
  - [x] Trong `pos-api/src/prisma/tenant-scope.extension.ts`, thêm `Area` và `Table` vào `SCOPED_MODELS`.
  - [x] Cập nhật spec liên quan nếu assert danh sách scoped models.
  - [x] Không đưa `Store` vào scoped models ở story này trừ khi toàn bộ auth/store access đã được audit; story 6.4 sẽ thêm endpoint `/stores/me` có service guard riêng.

- [x] Mở rộng seed idempotent cho store table-mode (AC: 3)
  - [x] Giữ constants hiện có (`TENANT_ID`, `STORE_ID`, users/menu data) cho store counter; update store hiện hữu với `tableMode: false`.
  - [x] Thêm deterministic IDs cho store thứ 2, admin/cashier table-mode nếu cần tạo orders hợp lệ, 2 areas, 8 tables; dùng UUID v7-shaped fixed IDs như seed hiện tại.
  - [x] Seed areas/tables qua `upsert`, unique theo `(tenantId, storeId, name)`; không tạo duplicate khi chạy nhiều lần.
  - [x] Tạo 2-3 sample orders trong store thứ 2 với `tableId` và `tableNameSnapshot`; nếu dùng products/menu hiện có, phải tạo/clone menu data cần thiết cho store thứ 2 hoặc dùng seed helper chung để tránh FK/cross-store mismatch.
  - [x] Bảo đảm sample orders vẫn có snapshot fields đầy đủ, `soldAt` ISO/Date UTC, VND integer, `PaymentMethod` hợp lệ.

- [x] Thêm/điều chỉnh e2e seed verification (AC: 4, 6)
  - [x] Tạo `pos-api/test/seed.e2e-spec.ts` hoặc mở rộng test seed hiện có nếu đã tồn tại.
  - [x] Test chạy seed, đếm `areas`/`tables` cho store table-mode: 2 areas, 8 tables, capacities trong 2-4, `isActive=true` default.
  - [x] Test store counter hiện hữu có `tableMode=false` và không thấy tables của store thứ 2 khi query theo tenant/store context.
  - [x] Test có 2-3 orders store thứ 2 với `tableId != null` + `tableNameSnapshot` đúng; old store orders vẫn `tableId=null`.

- [x] Regression gates và documentation (AC: 2, 5, 6)
  - [x] Chạy/document từ `pos-api/`: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm test`, `npm run test:e2e -- seed`.
  - [x] Nếu migration làm thay đổi generated Prisma types khiến existing unit tests fail, sửa tests theo schema mới nhưng không đổi behavior endpoints hiện có.
  - [x] Cập nhật Dev Agent Record file list/completion notes khi triển khai.

## Dev Notes

### Source Requirements

- Epic 6 là brownfield expansion cho Table Service Mode, thêm ngày 2026-05-25 qua Sprint Change Proposal `SCP-2026-05-25-table-mgmt`; không re-open Epic 2/3, các patch liên quan được nhúng vào Epic 6. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md` Epic 6]
- Story 6.1 là foundation: schema `areas`/`tables`, `stores.tableMode`, `orders.tableId/tableNameSnapshot`, migration, seed extend. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md` Story 6.1]
- Dependency order: 6.1 chặn toàn bộ Epic 6; sau khi done mới chạy 6.2/6.3/6.4. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md` Epic 6 dependencies; `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/sprint-change-proposal-2026-05-25.md`]

### Current Code State (must preserve)

- `pos-api/prisma/schema.prisma` hiện có `Tenant`, `Store`, `User`, menu models, `Order`, `OrderItem`, `OrderItemOption`, `SyncLog`, `OrderVoid`; chưa có `Area`/`Table`, `Store.tableMode`, `Order.tableId`, `Order.tableNameSnapshot`.
- Existing `Order` fields include `clientOrderId`, `orderCode`, `deviceId`, `cashierId`, `soldAt`, `syncedAt`, `menuVersionAtSale`, `discountAmount`, `total`, `paymentMethod`; keep existing relation/items/voids behavior.
- `pos-api/src/orders/repositories/orders.repository.ts` creates orders in `createOrderWithSyncLog()` and currently does not know table fields. Story 6.1 should not change sync DTO/service behavior except schema compatibility; Story 6.4 will patch DTO/persist/validate table fields.
- `pos-api/src/prisma/tenant-scope.extension.ts` currently scopes: `Category`, `Product`, `OptionGroup`, `Option`, `MenuVersion`, `Order`, `SyncLog`. Add `Area`, `Table` here so later CRUD cannot accidentally leak cross-store data.
- Seed currently has one tenant/store (`Café Demo POS01`) and deterministic UUID v7-shaped IDs. Follow that pattern; avoid random IDs that break repeatability.

### Architecture Guardrails

- Naming convention is strict across boundaries: DB table plural snake_case (`areas`, `tables`), DB columns snake_case (`tenant_id`, `store_id`, `table_id`, `table_name_snapshot`, `table_mode`, `sort_order`, `area_id`), Prisma models singular PascalCase (`Area`, `Table`), fields camelCase. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md` §3]
- Multi-tenant scope applies to `areas`, `tables`, `orders.table_id`; every business DB query must go through Prisma `$extends` auto-scope tenant+store. Cross-tenant table references later must be 400 validation; story 6.1 enables scoped models now. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md` Rule 5]
- Snapshot immutability: `tableNameSnapshot` is immutable after insert; do not add update logic for snapshot fields. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md` Rule 4]
- API dates stay ISO 8601 UTC and VND stays integer; seed/sample orders must respect this. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md` Rule 7]
- No raw unscoped SQL in app code. Migration SQL generated by Prisma is fine; repository/service code must not use `$queryRaw`/`$executeRaw` for scoped business queries. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md` Rule 5]

### Data Model Details to Implement

Recommended Prisma shape (adapt to exact relation names if Prisma requires):

```prisma
model Store {
  id        String  @id @db.Uuid
  tenantId  String  @map("tenant_id") @db.Uuid
  name      String
  code      String
  tableMode Boolean @default(false) @map("table_mode")
  areas     Area[]
  tables    Table[]
  // existing fields unchanged
}

model Area {
  id        String   @id @db.Uuid
  tenantId  String   @map("tenant_id") @db.Uuid
  storeId   String   @map("store_id") @db.Uuid
  name      String
  sortOrder Int      @default(0) @map("sort_order")
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
  tenant    Tenant   @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict, onUpdate: Cascade)
  store     Store    @relation(fields: [storeId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict, onUpdate: Cascade)
  tables    Table[]
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz(6)
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at") @db.Timestamptz(6)

  @@unique([tenantId, storeId, name], map: "uq_areas_tenant_store_name")
  @@index([tenantId, storeId], map: "idx_areas_tenant_store")
  @@map("areas")
}

model Table {
  id        String   @id @db.Uuid
  tenantId  String   @map("tenant_id") @db.Uuid
  storeId   String   @map("store_id") @db.Uuid
  areaId    String   @map("area_id") @db.Uuid
  name      String
  capacity  Int      @default(2)
  sortOrder Int      @default(0) @map("sort_order")
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
  tenant    Tenant   @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict, onUpdate: Cascade)
  store     Store    @relation(fields: [storeId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict, onUpdate: Cascade)
  area      Area     @relation(fields: [areaId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict, onUpdate: Cascade)
  orders    Order[]
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz(6)
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at") @db.Timestamptz(6)

  @@unique([tenantId, storeId, name], map: "uq_tables_tenant_store_name")
  @@index([tenantId, storeId], map: "idx_tables_tenant_store")
  @@index([areaId], map: "idx_tables_area_id")
  @@map("tables")
}
```

For `Order`, add nullable fields/relation only; do not require table on existing orders:

```prisma
tableId           String? @map("table_id") @db.Uuid
tableNameSnapshot String? @map("table_name_snapshot")
table             Table?  @relation(fields: [tableId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict, onUpdate: Cascade)
@@index([tableId], map: "idx_orders_table_id")
```

### Seed Guidance

- Use deterministic IDs; do not call `uuidv7()` for fixed demo entities unless current seed already does for that entity class.
- `tableMode=false` must be explicitly preserved on existing `STORE_ID` in `store.upsert.update` and `create`.
- For store thứ 2, choose a stable code (e.g. `TABLE01`) and stable IDs. If user logins are needed for e2e, create admin/cashier for store 2 with distinct emails.
- Be careful with FK consistency for sample orders: `cashierId`, products/options/menuVersion/order items must belong to same tenant/store. If cloning menu data for store 2 is too large, create minimal products/options for store 2 using existing helper loops parameterized by store.
- Keep seed idempotent: use `upsert` for tenant/store/users/menu/areas/tables/orders where possible; for nested order items/options, either stable IDs with upsert/create-if-missing or delete/recreate only the known demo orders in a scoped transaction.

### Testing Requirements

- Unit/spec updates:
  - `tenant-scope.extension` tests should prove `Area` and `Table` get tenant/store `where` and write data scoping.
  - Existing orders specs must still pass with nullable table fields.
- E2E seed test:
  - Can use Prisma directly with tenant context utility or explicit `where` clauses, but assertions must demonstrate isolation by `tenantId/storeId`.
  - Do not depend on order of seed execution outside `npm run test:e2e -- seed`; if test needs seed, run/trigger seed in setup according to existing e2e pattern.
- Gates to document in Dev Agent Record:
  - `cd pos-api && npm run typecheck`
  - `cd pos-api && npm run lint`
  - `cd pos-api && npm test`
  - `cd pos-api && npm run test:e2e -- seed`

### Out of Scope for Story 6.1

- Do not implement `/api/v1/areas`, `/api/v1/tables`, `/api/v1/stores/me`, or `/api/v1/tables/status`; those are Stories 6.2–6.4.
- Do not patch `SyncOrderDto` to accept `tableId/tableNameSnapshot` yet unless needed only for seed/test internals; API contract patch is Story 6.4.
- Do not build frontend table mode UI/admin pages; those are Stories 6.5–6.9.
- Do not change auth/session/token behavior.

### Previous Story Intelligence

- Story 5.1 completed admin orders list/detail and added/extended `GET /api/v1/orders` + `GET /api/v1/orders/:id`; preserve these endpoints and their DTOs while adding nullable table fields.
- Story 5.1 reinforced snapshot-only order detail and no join to current product for historical data. `tableNameSnapshot` follows the same rule.
- Current recent commits include UI/image/logout work; no Epic 6 code exists yet, so schema migration is the first concrete implementation step.

### Project Structure Notes

- Backend schema/migration/seed live under `pos-api/prisma/`.
- Tenant scope extension lives under `pos-api/src/prisma/`.
- Tests live under `pos-api/src/**/*.spec.ts` and `pos-api/test/*.e2e-spec.ts`.
- Future `src/tables/` module is documented in architecture, but should not be created in 6.1 unless a test helper genuinely needs it; CRUD module starts in 6.2.

### Completion Notes List

- Added nullable/backward-compatible table-service schema foundation: `Area`, `Table`, `Store.tableMode`, and nullable order table snapshot fields.
- Added Prisma migration `20260525083759_epic6_table_management`; SQL uses nullable/default columns and RESTRICT/CASCADE FKs consistent with existing schema.
- Added `Area` and `Table` to tenant-scope model set and updated unit assertion.
- Extended seed idempotently: existing counter store remains `tableMode=false`; table-mode store `TABLE01` gets 2 areas, 8 tables, and 3 sample table orders with `tableId`/`tableNameSnapshot`.
- Added seed e2e verification for table-mode counts, counter-store isolation, capacities/default active state, and nullable legacy orders.
- Resolved code-review patch finding: fixed/verified `pos-api/prisma/seed.ts` malformed block/unmatched brace issue; `npm run typecheck` and `npm run test:e2e -- seed` now pass.
- Resolved unrelated lint blockers (per user option 1) with minimal safe typing/error fixes limited to allowed menu files; all required gates now pass.
